text: Hyperliquid's $HYPE token has shown strong price performance and resilience, with significant on-chain long positions and growing community engagement. The token is viewed as a comfortable hold with substantial upside potential, supported by robust tokenomics including buybacks and revenue sharing. The platform's liquidity and user base continue to expand, positioning $HYPE for potential new all-time highs.
author: elfa_2043079879617282548

text: Hyperliquid's new priority fee mechanism on testnet allows traders to pay $HYPE tokens to gain transaction and order priority, democratizing competitive advantages beyond engineering prowess. This feature is expected to increase continuous demand for $HYPE tokens as the platform scales with more asset classes and market events, enhancing value capture and token utility.
author: elfa_2043051129756619182

text: Bitwise has filed an updated S-1 amendment for a spot $HYPE ETF with a staking component, with ticker BHYP and fees disclosed, indicating the ETF launch is approaching. Other major firms like Grayscale, 21Shares, and VanEck are also competing to list $HYPE ETFs, reflecting growing institutional interest and mainstream adoption of Hyperliquid.
author: elfa_2043059181771739558

text: Hyperliquid has become a key venue for 24/7 trading of traditional assets such as oil, especially during times when traditional markets are closed, demonstrating its role as a global financial infrastructure platform. Its HIP-3 markets have seen over $1.4 billion in daily RWA volume and $1.3 billion in open interest, with nearly $700 million in revenue generated over the past year. The platform is expanding into on-chain spot trading of tokenized real-world assets via Melt, integrating with Ondo Finance to offer fully backed tokenized stocks and commodities with native order books and continuous accessibility.
author: elfa_2042984092111720634

text: Hyperliquid ($HYPE) is gaining significant traction as a leading crypto-native perpetual DEX with expanding features including HIP-3 and upcoming HIP-4 upgrades introducing prediction markets and unified spot margin accounts. The platform is noted for its 24/7 trading of real-world assets (RWAs) like oil and equities, attracting institutional interest and generating substantial revenue. Priority fees recently launched on testnet allow traders to pay for transaction and order priority, creating continuous demand for $HYPE tokens. Bitwise and other firms are filing for $HYPE ETFs, signaling growing mainstream adoption. The tokenomics include buybacks funded by revenue and liquidations, supporting price stability and upside potential. The ecosystem is still in early stages with opportunities for cultural activations and new narratives.
author: elfa_2043087290852110593

text: How To Track Zcash Transactions Zcash is only partially private, not automatically untraceable It uses ZKPs and supports both transparent and shielded addresses, so only fully shielded z → z transactions are hidden, while a lot of activity still happens through transparent addresses Most ZEC activity can still be tracked through visible entry and exit points. Because exchanges and institutions often use transparent addresses, tools like Arkham can label and follow a large share of Zcash volume (fully shielded transfers remain opaque)

text: Bhutan has sold 70% of its Bitcoin holdings over the past 18 months. Arkham data reveals that the country's stash has dropped from roughly 13,000 BTC in October 2024 to the current 3,954 BTC (worth approximately $280.6 million), with $215.7 million in BTC transferred out this year alone.
